full_description: TravelBuddy is a travel planning app that helps users organize their trips and itineraries. It provides a simple and intuitive way to plan and book travel arrangements. With TravelBuddy, you can research destinations, book flights and hotels, and create a personalized itinerary. The app also allows you to share your travel plans with friends and family, and receive real-time updates on flight schedules and travel alerts. Whether you're planning a business trip or a vacation, TravelBuddy is the perfect companion to help you make the most of your travels.
